stemHtml: Which of the following is true with respect to heating of pitot and static sensors…

options.a: Combined pitot/static tubes are always heated but static ports are never heated.
options.b: Both pitot and static sensing is always heated.
options.c: Pitot tubes are always provided with a heater while static ports may also be heated.
options.d: Pitot tube and static port heating are switched on automatically when icing conditions are met.
